CrunchSnaps
  • API Reference
  • View page source

API Reference

Field Registration Functions

CrunchSnaps.snapshot_tasks.register_derived_field(name, expr)

Register a named derived field.

>>> register_derived_field("MagneticPressure", "norm(MagneticField)**2 / (8*pi)")
CrunchSnaps.snapshot_tasks.register_field_fallback(name, expr)

Register a fallback expression for a snapshot field.

The fallback is used only when PartType0/<name> is not present in the snapshot. If the field exists on disk, the snapshot value is used.

>>> register_field_fallback("Pressure", "(5./3 - 1) * Density * InternalEnergy")
CrunchSnaps.snapshot_tasks.register_field_symbol(name, latex)

Register a LaTeX symbol for a field or expression.

>>> register_field_symbol("Temperature", r"T\;\mathrm{(K)}")
CrunchSnaps.snapshot_tasks.parse_custom_task(spec)

Parse a task spec like ‘SurfaceDensity(Masses*Temperature)’.

Returns (render_mode, field_expr) or None if not a custom task.

Expression Evaluation

CrunchSnaps.snapshot_tasks.max_entropy_limits(vals, weights, n_bins=128, n_search=32, log_scale=False)

Find (lo, hi) that maximize mass-weighted Shannon entropy of the color histogram.

The search runs on the displayed axis: when log_scale=True, the objective is the entropy of the log10(value) histogram, and the returned limits are still in linear units.

Ported from vizmo.field_ops.max_entropy_limits.

CrunchSnaps.snapshot_tasks.max_entropy_limits_multi(map_arrays, n_bins=128, n_search=32, log_scale=False)

Find (lo, hi) that maximize the sum of per-frame Shannon entropies.

Each frame’s entropy is mass-weighted (pixel values used as weights), so limits are chosen to maximize information about where the mass is across the entire sequence.

Parameters:

  • map_arrays – list of 2D arrays (one per frame, e.g. surface density maps).

  • n_bins – histogram bin count.

  • n_search – grid resolution per axis (lo, hi).

  • log_scale – when True, optimize in log10 space and return linear limits.

Task Classes

class CrunchSnaps.snapshot_tasks.SinkVis(params)
class CrunchSnaps.snapshot_tasks.SinkVisSigmaGas(params)

Bases: SinkVis

class CrunchSnaps.snapshot_tasks.SinkVisCoolMap(params)

Bases: SinkVis

class CrunchSnaps.snapshot_tasks.SinkVisNarrowbandComposite(params)

Bases: SinkVis

class CrunchSnaps.snapshot_tasks.SinkVisCustomField(params)

Bases: SinkVis

Generic task that renders an arbitrary field expression.

Supports four render modes:

  • SurfaceDensity(expr): integral of expr along the line of sight (Σ)

  • Projection(expr): same as SurfaceDensity (alias)

  • ProjectedAverage(expr): mass-weighted projected average of expr

  • Slice(expr): midplane slice of expr

Main Entry Point

CrunchSnaps.CrunchSnaps.DoTasksForSimulation(snaps=[], task_types=[], task_params=[], interp_fac=1, nproc=1, nthreads=1, snaptime_dict=None, id_mask=None)

Main CrunchSnaps routine, performs a list of tasks using (possibly interpolated) time series simulation data snaps - list of paths of simulation snapshots task_types - list of tasks to perform at each simulation time task_params - shape [N_tasks,N_params] list of dictionaries containing the parameters for each task - if only (N_tasks,) list is provided this will be broadcast
